title: uragoga mannii
intro: Uragoga mannii, also known as the "monkey pepper", is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Uragoga mannii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Uragoga mannii include infusions and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
